title: Capstone 07 — End-to-End Fine-Tuning Pipeline (Data to SFT to DPO to Serve)

questions.question: What does the contamination check guard against during data preparation?
options: Tokenizer drift between SFT and DPO stages
GPU driver mismatches between training and serving
GGUF version skew across llama.cpp builds
Test-set leakage from public benchmarks such as MMLU-Pro and MT-Bench-v2 into training data

questions.question: Why does the pipeline compose SFT then DPO (or GRPO) rather than DPO alone?
options: SFT establishes domain behavior on labeled completions while DPO or GRPO aligns the model against preference pairs or verifiable rewards
DPO requires a separate base model architecture
DPO cannot run on quantized weights

questions.question: What does EAGLE-3 contribute to the vLLM serving stage?
options: An OPA policy for tool calls
Draft heads that predict N tokens ahead; the target verifies in one pass for 2-3x throughput

questions.question: Which metric reports how well a speculative-decoding draft aligns with the target model?
Which trio of quants does the pipeline ship for deployment flexibility?
Which framework convention does the 2026 model card follow in this capstone?
options: Model Openness Framework (MOF) 2026 template covering data, training, eval, safety, license, and reproducibility

questions.question: Which HPA metric is used to autoscale the serving replicas?
